# Lite Sample Feature

- **Name:** Lite Sample Feature
- **Description:** A minimal Lite-path work used to verify SPEC.md identity parsing.
- **Work:** work-006-lite-sample
- **Created:** 2026-06-10
- **Source:** /aid-interview lite path -- LITE-FEATURE
- **Status:** Ready

## Overview

This work exercises the SPEC.md fallback identity path (PF-8).
It has no REQUIREMENTS.md; title and description are read from the SPEC identity block.
